title: Untitled Garment I
description: A vibrant wearable art piece showcasing Rachel's layered textile techniques and expressive use of color. This work reflects her blend of tradition and personal storytelling.
alt: Colorful wearable art garment by Rachel D.K. Clark

title: Untitled Garment II
description: This garment combines intricate fabric patterns with bold structural design. It highlights Rachel's attention to detail and love of visual rhythm.
alt: Handcrafted textile garment with patterned fabrics

title: Untitled Garment III
description: An expressive piece featuring layered textures and dynamic color contrasts. The design reflects Rachel's roots in traditional quilting and contemporary folk art.
alt: Textile art garment with layered fabrics

title: Untitled Garment IV
description: This work blends playful pattern combinations with strong visual balance. It demonstrates Rachel's signature approach to wearable storytelling.
alt: Wearable art garment with mixed fabric patterns

title: Untitled Garment V
description: A richly detailed garment that explores color, movement, and form. The piece reflects Rachel's long-standing commitment to craft and experimentation.
alt: Handmade garment with colorful textile design

title: Untitled Garment VI
description: This garment features bold contrasts and carefully arranged fabric elements. It highlights the balance between structure and spontaneity in Rachel's work.
alt: Artistic textile garment with bold color contrasts

title: Untitled Garment VII
description: An imaginative piece that combines traditional quilting influences with contemporary design. The garment reflects Rachel's playful and thoughtful aesthetic.

title: Untitled Garment VIII
description: This work showcases layered patterns and expressive color choices. It illustrates Rachel's ability to merge narrative and craftsmanship.
alt: Layered textile garment with expressive colors

title: Untitled Garment IX
description: A visually striking garment built from diverse fabric elements. The piece emphasizes Rachel's commitment to originality and cultural reference.
alt: Textile art garment with diverse fabric elements

title: Untitled Garment X
description: This garment reflects Rachel's interest in pattern, texture, and movement. Its design encourages close viewing and exploration.

title: Untitled Garment XI
description: An expressive wearable piece featuring layered construction and bold visual themes. It demonstrates Rachel's evolving creative voice.

title: Untitled Garment XII
description: This work combines strong compositional structure with playful surface design. It reflects Rachel's deep engagement with fabric as a storytelling medium.
alt: Structured garment with decorative textile surfaces

title: Untitled Garment XIII

alt: Textured wearable art garment with layered fabrics

title: Untitled Garment XIV
description: This garment showcases Rachel's signature blend of craftsmanship, color, and narrative expression. It represents her ongoing exploration of wearable art.
alt: Narrative textile garment by Rachel D.K. Clark
